discrepancies.explanation: hba1c_poor_control: Platform rate 80.7% vs payer 23.9% (Δ+56.8pp). Denominator difference: platform has 813, payer has 176. May be due to different exclusion criteria.
discrepancies.resolution_recommendation: Compare member-level measure results. Identify members where platform and payer disagree on numerator/denominator status. Check for EHR-only data and claims-only exclusions.
discrepancies.description: hba1c_poor_control: Platform rate 80.7% vs payer 23.9% (Δ+56.8pp). Denominator difference: platform has 813, payer has 176. May be due to different exclusion criteria.

relevant_clauses.clause_text: The ACO's quality performance shall be evaluated across the following measures, each weighted equally at 20% of the composite score.
relevant_clauses.interpretation: Evaluating 5 quality measures with equal weighting. Data conflict resolution: most recent clinical.
